400.title: Bad Request
400.subtitle: The server couldn't understand that one.
400.message: Your request was malformed or missing required fields. Double-check the URL and any parameters you sent.
400.hint: Try refreshing the page or going back and trying again.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.subtitle: Who goes there?
401.message: You need to be authenticated to access this resource. Please log in and try again.
401.hint: Make sure you're logged in. If you just logged out, your session may have expired.

403.title: Forbidden
403.subtitle: You shall not pass.
403.message: You're authenticated, but you don't have permission to access this resource. This area is off-limits.
403.hint: If you believe this is a mistake, contact the room host or administrator.

404.title: Not Found
404.subtitle: This room has gone quiet.
404.message: The page, room, or resource you're looking for doesn't exist — or has already evaporated into thin air.
404.hint: Rooms in DaffyChat are ephemeral. If everyone left, the room is gone. Try creating a new one.

405.title: Method Not Allowed
405.subtitle: That's not how this works.
405.message: The HTTP method you used (GET, POST, etc.) is not allowed for this endpoint.
405.hint: This is usually a developer issue. If you're a user, try reloading the page.

408.title: Request Timeout
408.subtitle: You took too long.
408.message: The server gave up waiting for your request to complete. The connection timed out.
408.hint: Check your internet connection and try again. If the problem persists, the server may be under load.

409.title: Conflict
409.subtitle: Something's already there.
409.message: The request conflicts with the current state of the server. Perhaps this room ID already exists.
409.hint: Try a different room name or ID, or refresh the page to get the current state.

410.title: Gone
410.subtitle: It was here once.
410.message: This resource existed, but has been permanently removed. Unlike 404, we know it was here — and now it's gone forever.
410.hint: This room has been permanently deleted. There's no coming back from this one.

413.title: Payload Too Large
413.subtitle: That's a big file.
413.message: The data you're trying to send exceeds the server's size limit.
413.hint: Try splitting your upload into smaller parts, or compress the file before sending.

418.title: I'm a Teapot
418.subtitle: Short and stout.
418.message: The server refuses to brew coffee because it is, permanently, a teapot. This is a classic RFC 2324 joke.
418.hint: You've found the Easter egg. 🫖 Try asking for tea instead.

422.title: Unprocessable Entity
422.subtitle: We understand, but we can't do it.
422.message: The request was well-formed, but the server couldn't process the contained instructions due to semantic errors.
422.hint: Check that all required fields are valid and properly formatted.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.subtitle: Slow down there.
429.message: You've sent too many requests in a short period. The server is rate-limiting you.
429.hint: Wait a moment and try again. DaffyChat servers are small and friendly — be gentle with them.

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.subtitle: Something went wrong on our end.
500.message: The server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling your request. This is our fault, not yours.
500.hint: Try refreshing in a few moments. If the problem persists, the backend daemon may need to be restarted.

501.title: Not Implemented
501.subtitle: Coming soon™.
501.message: The server does not support the functionality required to fulfill your request. This feature hasn't been built yet.
501.hint: Check back later — DaffyChat is actively developed. Maybe open a GitHub issue!

502.title: Bad Gateway
502.subtitle: The middleman dropped the ball.
502.message: A server acting as a gateway received an invalid response from an upstream server.
502.hint: This is usually temporary. Wait a moment and refresh. The reverse proxy may be misconfigured.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.subtitle: Be right back.
503.message: The server is temporarily unable to handle the request due to maintenance or being overloaded.
503.hint: DaffyChat may be restarting a service. Give it a moment and refresh. The daemon manager is on it.

504.title: Gateway Timeout
504.subtitle: Upstream took too long.
504.message: A server acting as a gateway did not receive a timely response from an upstream server.
504.hint: The backend service may be overloaded or unreachable. Try again in a moment.

default.title: Something Went Wrong
default.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred.
default.message: DaffyChat encountered an error it didn't expect. The server returned a status code that has no specific page.
default.hint: Try going back to the home page. If the problem repeats, check that the backend services are running.
